title: Samsung Smart Glasses Last for 9 Hours. Check Out the New Designs
summary: Samsung closed out today's Unpacked event with another peek at its upcoming smart glasses , including two new design options. The glasses will run a Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1 Gen1 chip, previously used in the Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses .
